task_completion.description: Verify the 'Mitosis' sample image is opened in ImageJ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An ImageJ image window titled 'Mitosis' (or similar, like 'Mitosis (26MB)') is visible, showing sliders for Z (slices), C (channels), and T (frames).

task_completion.description: Verify a Maximum Intensity Z-Projection was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new image window is visible (often titled 'MAX_Mitosis') that lacks a Z-slider but retains the T-slider (time frames), indicating the Z-slices have been collapsed.

task_completion.description: Verify Channel 1 (chromosomes) is isolated from the Z-projected image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image window showing only one channel (e.g., titled 'C1-MAX_Mitosis' if channels were split, or the C-slider is removed/fixed to 1). The image should still have the T-slider with 51 frames.

task_completion.description: Verify the resulting time-lapse is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or ImageJ save dialog showing 'chromosomes_timelapse.tif' located in the '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the Mean Gray Value is quantified for all time frames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An ImageJ 'Results' window is open displaying a table with a 'Mean' column and exactly 51 rows (one for each time frame).

task_completion.description: Verify the measurements are saved as a CSV file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or ImageJ save dialog showing 'intensity_trace.csv' located in the '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ImageJ GUI to process the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show ImageJ menus being opened (e.g., Image > Stacks > Z Project, Image > Color > Split Channels, Analyze > Measure) rather than terminal commands bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the measurements in the Results table appear genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Results' table should show varying numerical values in the 'Mean' column across the 51 frames, not identical dummy values or manually typed text.

integrity.description: Verify the output files were actually saved via the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use File > Save As in ImageJ or the Results window's File > Save As, rather than using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo' to create empty/fake files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'Mitosis' sample is built into ImageJ (accessible via File > Open Samples > Mitosis). The original image has 2 channels, 5 Z-slices, and 51 time-frames. After Maximum Intensity Z-Projection and isolating Channel 1, the resulting image must have exactly 1 channel, 1 Z-slice, and 51 time-frames. The final measurements table should contain exactly 51 rows corresponding to the Mean Gray Value of each time frame.
